sections.title: Attempting to use his anvils before the quest

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Hey, who said you could use that? My anvils get enough work with my own use. I make pickaxes, and it takes a lot of hard work.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, would it be OK if I used your anvils?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: If you could get me some more materials then I could let you use them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't want to use your anvils anyway.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: That is your choice.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Hello traveller, what brings you to my humble smithy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanted to use your anvils.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: My anvils get enough work with my own use. I make pickaxes, and it takes a lot of hard work. If you could get me some more materials, then I could let you use them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I will get you the materials.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Clay is what I use more than anything, to make casts. Could you get me 6 clay, 4 copper ore, and 2 iron ore, please? I could pay a little, and let you use my anvils. Take this pickaxe with you just in case you need it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find those?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: You'll be able to find all those ores in the rocks just inside the Dwarven Mine. Head east from here and you'll find the entrance in the side of Ice Mountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Certainly, I'll be right back!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know, it's funny you should require those exact things!

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can usually fit 28 things in my backpack and in a world full of quite literally limitless possibilities, a complete coincidence has occurred!

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: I don't quite understand what you're saying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, out of pure coincidence, despite definitely not knowing what you were about to request, I just so happened to have carried those exact items!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In fact, in the exact quantities too!

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Oh my, that is a coincidence! Pass them here, please. I can spare you some coins for your trouble, and please use my anvils any time you want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, hitting rocks is for the boring people, sorry.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: That is your choice. Nice to meet you anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanted to use your whetstone.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: The whetstone is for more advanced smithing, but I could let you use it as well as my anvils if you could get me some more materials.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mind your own business, shortstuff!

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: How nice to meet someone with such pleasant manners. Do come again when you need to shout at someone smaller than you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just checking out the landscape.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Hope you like it. I do enjoy the solitude of my little home. If you get time, please say hi to my friends in the Dwarven Mine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dwarven Mine?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Yep, the entrance is in the side of Ice Mountain just to the east of here. They're a friendly bunch. Stop in at Nurmof's store and buy one of my pickaxes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Will do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you make here?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: I make pickaxes. I am the best maker of pickaxes in the whole of Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any to sell?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Sorry, but I've got a running order with Nurmof.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's Nurmof?

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Nurmof has a store over in the Dwarven Mine. You can find the entrance on the side of Ice Mountain to the east of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, fair enough.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Hello traveller, how is your metalworking coming along?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not too bad, Doric.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Good, the love of metal is a thing close to my heart.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: Well done.

lines.speaker: Doric
lines.text: So, you've come to the right place?
